fixtures._comment: auth check turn 1 — the probe sends this after sign-in (idiomatic) or on page load (legacy). Response proves the authenticated chat round-trip works before the assertion clicks sign-out.

response.content: Authenticated and ready. Your session is active — go ahead and ask me anything, or the probe will now test the sign-out flow.

fixtures._comment: post-signout probe — legacy shape sends this after clicking sign-out to trigger a 401. The fixture matches but the demo's auth gate should block the request before it reaches the agent.

response.content: This response should not be visible — the auth gate should have blocked the request after sign-out.
